subject: Human Resources
title: What Diversity Really Means
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: What Diversity Really Means.

hook.text: A company hires people of every ethnicity—but they all went to the same five schools and think the same way.

buildup.text: Diversity goes beyond demographics—it includes thought, experience, education, neurodiversity, and socioeconomic background.

twist.text: A team can look diverse but think identically. True diversity requires difference in how people approach problems.

climax.text: The goal isn't headcount diversity on paper. It's cognitive diversity in practice—varied minds solving hard problems together.

punchline.text: Diversity isn't what people look like. It's how they think.

quiz.question: What is deep diversity?
options: Differences in perspectives, thinking styles, and life experiences
